sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n235" key="a)gaqai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγαθαίνω</orth>, <sense id="n235.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-ύνω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg006:p.70D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Epict.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.70D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
